[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010100111 6
1 1101000010 4
2 1111100111 8
3 0100101101 5
4 0011101100 5
5 0011111010 6
6 1101000010 4
7 1111100111 8

01 10 1111000111 7
12 21 1111100111 8 match 2 7

34 43 1111100111 8 match 2 7
45 54 1111101111 9

70 07 1101011111 8

36 63 1101101011 7
47 74 1111111111 a
50 05 1101101111 8

72 27 1011111111 9
